description: Build IPFS-mode domain UI artifacts and run Playwright smoke against served deployable bundles, including reload/deep-link/domain-routing behavior. Guarded because the Playwright global setup restarts/clears local E2E stack state.

data.label: IPFS domain artifact Playwright smoke
data.mutatesState: Requires COMMONALITY_VERIFIER_ALLOW_E2E_STACK=1. The UI Playwright global setup may clean Hardhat/Ponder E2E state while starting Docker services for the artifact smoke.
